data.query: Analyse Gold Flake sales in South Delhi
data.aiText:
• Gold Flake leads sales in South Delhi for the selected period, contributing the largest share of total sales.
• WD code SDL01 is the top-performing pocket; consider reinforcing stock and visibility here.
• Avg daily sales are steady; there may be upside by expanding distribution in SDL02 and SDL03.

Recommended actions:
1) Prioritize replenishment for Gold Flake across SDL01–SDL03.
2) Increase call frequency in SDL02 to close the gap with SDL01.
3) Validate outlet coverage in SDL03 to identify whitespace.
